context: A taxi is the one place you must make yourself understood quickly, often with luggage and in a hurry. You only need three moves: say where you're going, check the fare, and tell the driver when to stop.
explanation: Start with "lleveme a..." (take me to...) and the place - this is how every ride begins. "El hotel" and "el aeropuerto" are the two destinations you'll name most. Get in, say it, and you're on your way.

examples.en: Take me to the airport, please.

examples.note: Show the address on your phone.
Short version once you're settled in.
